prompt: A billing report for the quarter: hours logged per client and the invoices we should be sending out.
wire:
<App name="Quarterly Billing Report">
  <Query id="hostListClients" tool="host_listClients" input={{}}/>
  <Query id="hostListClients2" tool="host_listClients" input={{ filter: "complete" }}/>
  <Query id="hostListClients3" tool="host_listClients" input={{ filter: "missing" }}/>
  <Query id="hostListDeadlines" tool="host_listDeadlines" input={{}}/>
  <Stack gap={4}>
    <Row gap={2}>
      <Text variant="heading" text="Quarterly Billing Report"/>
      <Badge label="Q3 2026" tone="neutral"/>
    </Row>
    <Callout tone="warning" title="Billing data not available on this host">
      This practice tool does not expose hours logged, time tracking, or invoice data. The report below shows document collection progress per client — the closest available proxy for billable work this quarter.
    </Callout>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={3}>
        <Text variant="heading" text="Document Collection Progress — All Clients"/>
        <Text variant="caption" text="Sorted by filing deadline. Use this to identify clients ready to bill (all documents received) versus those still outstanding."/>
        <DataTable rows={hostListClients.data} searchable paginate={20} sortBy="filingDeadline asc" filterableBy={["status", "assignedStaff.name"]} columns={[{ key: "name", label: "Client" }, { key: "entityType", label: "Entity" }, { key: "assignedStaff.name", label: "Assigned Staff" }, { key: "filingDeadline", label: "Filing Deadline", format: "date" }, { key: "status", label: "Status", format: "enum" }, { key: "documentsReceived", label: "Docs Received", align: "end" }, { key: "documentsTotal", label: "Docs Total", align: "end" }]} emptyState="No clients found."/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
    <Grid columns={2}>
      <Surface>
        <Stack gap={3}>
          <Text variant="heading" text="Clients Ready to Bill"/>
          <Text variant="caption" text="All documents collected — these engagements can be invoiced."/>
          <DataTable rows={hostListClients2.data} columns={[{ key: "name", label: "Client" }, { key: "entityType", label: "Entity" }, { key: "assignedStaff.name", label: "Staff" }, { key: "filingDeadline", label: "Deadline", format: "date" }]} emptyState="No clients have completed document collection yet."/>
        </Stack>
      </Surface>
      <Surface>
        <Stack gap={3}>
          <Text variant="heading" text="Clients Still Outstanding"/>
          <Text variant="caption" text="Documents missing — hold billing until collection is complete."/>
          <DataTable rows={hostListClients3.data} columns={[{ key: "name", label: "Client" }, { key: "entityType", label: "Entity" }, { key: "assignedStaff.name", label: "Staff" }, { key: "filingDeadline", label: "Deadline", format: "date" }]} emptyState="No clients have outstanding documents — nothing to chase."/>
        </Stack>
      </Surface>
    </Grid>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={3}>
        <Text variant="heading" text="Upcoming Deadlines at Risk"/>
        <Text variant="caption" text="Clients ordered by soonest filing deadline with documents still missing."/>
        <DataTable rows={hostListDeadlines.data} searchable paginate={15} columns={[{ key: "name", label: "Client" }, { key: "entityType", label: "Entity" }, { key: "filingDeadline", label: "Filing Deadline", format: "date" }, { key: "assignedStaff.name", label: "Staff" }, { key: "documentsReceived", label: "Received", align: "end" }, { key: "documentsTotal", label: "Total", align: "end" }, { key: "missingDocumentKinds", label: "Missing Documents" }]} emptyState="No clients at deadline risk."/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={2}>
        <Text variant="heading" text="Hours Logged & Invoice Amounts"/>
        <Disclaimer title="Time tracking and invoicing not available" reason="This host does not provide tools for hours logged per client or invoice generation. To produce a true billing report with hours and invoice amounts, connect a time-tracking or billing integration (e.g. QuickBooks, FreshBooks, or your practice management billing module)."/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
  </Stack>
</App>

props.title: Billing data not available on this host

props.text: This practice tool does not expose hours logged, time tracking, or invoice data. The report below shows document collection progress per client — the closest available proxy for billable work this quarter.
Sorted by filing deadline. Use this to identify clients ready to bill (all documents received) versus those still outstanding.
All documents collected — these engagements can be invoiced.

props.emptyState: No clients have completed document collection yet.

props.text: Documents missing — hold billing until collection is complete.

props.emptyState: No clients have outstanding documents — nothing to chase.

props.text: Clients ordered by soonest filing deadline with documents still missing.

props.title: Time tracking and invoicing not available
props.reason: This host does not provide tools for hours logged per client or invoice generation. To produce a true billing report with hours and invoice amounts, connect a time-tracking or billing integration (e.g. QuickBooks, FreshBooks, or your practice management billing module).
